pages.text:
GENERAL INFORMATION
Imagine a fireproof coa(cid:415)ng so advanced it can shield steel struc-
tures, protect lives, and preserve your investment—all without
compromising on design or func(cid:415)onality. Introducing CharCoat SC,
the ul(cid:415)mate intumescent thin-film fireproof coa(cid:415)ng.
When exposed to high heat, CharCoat SC expands to form a tough,
insula(cid:415)ng char layer, protec(cid:415)ng your steel infrastructure from fire's
destruc(cid:415)ve force. It’s not just a product; it’s your frontline defense
against catastrophic failure.
CharCoat SC outperforms conven(cid:415)onal fireproofing op(cid:415)ons,
offering a superior combina(cid:415)on of aesthe(cid:415)cs, reliability, and protec-
(cid:415)on. When every second counts, CharCoat SC delivers.
Don’t let fire be the weak link in your project. Choose CharCoat SC to
CharCoat SC can be applied in residential, commercial and industrial
protect your steel structures, ensure compliance, and deliver peace
applications where architectural designs call for a thin-film, aesthet-
of mind.
ic, highly decorative finish.
Semi exterior or covered areas can also be completed using a water-
based, urethane or epoxy topcoat to seal the fireproofing system.
SPECIAL FEATURES
• 20 to 30 (cid:415)mes typical intumescent expansion
• DFT’s as low as 250 microns
• Fire rates steelwork up to 150 minutes
• Water based intumescent coa(cid:415)ng - Interior/Semi-Exterior
• Non-Toxic / Non-Hazardous (water-based)
• Most steelwork 1 or 2 coat applica(cid:415)on
• Permanent cost effec(cid:415)ve solu(cid:415)on
• Zero maintenance required
• Single component (s(cid:415)r and spray)
With CharCoat SC’s low spread rate, higher than average solids and • 0.600mm WFT in a single spray coat
extremely low DFT’s, we can provide the most cost effective solution • Brush applica(cid:415)on also available
for all of your steel fireproofing needs. • C1 and C2 environments (with Topcoat)
BAHRAIN | CENTRAL AMERICA | CHINA | INDONESIA | INDIA | ISRAEL | ROMANIA | SAUDI ARABIA | USA

pages.text:
TECHNICAL DATA
For Interior or semi-exterior applications, use CharCoat SC. Topcoats
are not required for interior works, but may be needed simply for
colour. For semi-external works topcoats are required. Water based,
Urethane or epoxy topcoats are acceptable.
CharCoat SC will last the lifetime of the steelwork if properly main-
tained.
CharCoat SC provides intumescent fire protection to structural
steelwork while maintaining architectural aesthetics for commercial
infrastructure assets including:
TRANSPORT STORAGE
• Airports
- Transport and store free from frost - preferably at a minimum of
• Stadiums and Leisure Facili(cid:415)es
+5(cid:481)C to a maximum of +35(cid:481)C.
• Office Buildings
- Shelf-life of unopened pails: 12 months based from date of
• Retail Complexes manufacture.
• Cinemas
PACKAGING
• Residen(cid:415)al Low and Highrise Apartments
• Atriums - 25kg Pails
- Plas(cid:415)c Pails
• Warehousing
- Other sizes on request
• Powersta(cid:415)ons
• Mines SURFACE PREPARATION
• Smelters Please refer to the Technical Data Sheet
• Shipyards
APPLICATION
• Swimming Pools (C4 topcoat required)
Please refer to the Technical Data Sheet
DRYING TIME
Please refer to the Technical Data Sheet
SAFETY AND ENVIRONMENT
Please refer to the Technical Data Sheet

CharCoat SC Up to 150 minutes
APPROVALS DESCRIPTION
BS476 Part 21 SC120 - 120 minutes - Interior/Semi-Exterior
UL Classification SC120 - 150 minutes - Interior/Semi-Exterior

knowledge and experience. Due to different materials and condi(cid:415)ons of applica(cid:415)on, which are beyond our control, we recommend in any case to carry out sufficient tests in
order to ensure that CharCoat Passive Fire Protec(cid:415)on products are suitable for the intended purpose and applica(cid:415)ons. Therefore, any liability for such recommenda(cid:415)ons
or any oral advice is expressly excluded unless we have acted willfully or by gross negligence. It is always the responsibility of the installer / purchaser to guarantee correct
prepara(cid:415)on, DFT (CharCoat Coa(cid:415)ngs) and thickness (CharCoat Firestop Products) of all CharCoat Passive Fire Protec(cid:415)on products. CharCoat Passive Fire Protec(cid:415)on is
not liable for installa(cid:415)on or faulty installa(cid:415)on. It is always the responsibility of the installer / purchaser to guarantee and cer(cid:415)fy the installa(cid:415)on of materials.
